calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-12-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Morley Li, present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Diffy Li, was sworn and examined.
Declaration of Minor's mother: Shu Yi Zhang filed July 7, 2005
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jonathan Li.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Reset To Jul-12-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Petitioner: Morley Li, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor: Diffy Li, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Lacks the Minor's Mother consent for Change of Name of a Minor, matter is continued to July 12, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit a DECLARATION by the Minor's Mother consenting to petition for change of name of a minor.
